name: AlgoVoi
label: AlgoVoi
description: Accept crypto payments on Algorand, VOI, Hedera & Stellar via AlgoVoi. Create hosted checkout links, verify on-chain payments, and trigger workflows the instant a payment confirms — no banks, no card processors, direct-to-wallet settlement. Works with both AlgoVoi Cloud (recommended, one key) and direct API.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.label: API Key
parameters.help: Your AlgoVoi API key. Recommended: use an AlgoVoi Cloud key (starts with 'algvc_') from https://dash.algovoi.co.uk → Settings → API Keys. Direct-API keys (starting with 'algv_') also work but require the fields below.

parameters.name: api_base
parameters.label: API Base URL
parameters.help: Leave as https://cloud.algovoi.co.uk to use AlgoVoi Cloud (recommended — payout addresses and tenant routing are managed centrally in your Cloud dashboard). For direct API access, change to https://api1.ilovechicken.co.uk and fill in Tenant ID + payout addresses below.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.label: Tenant ID (direct-API only)
parameters.help: Leave blank if using AlgoVoi Cloud (algvc_ key). Required only when using a direct algv_ key against api1.ilovechicken.co.uk — your tenant UUID from dash.algovoi.co.uk → Settings.

parameters.name: payout_algorand
parameters.label: Payout Address — Algorand (direct-API only)
parameters.help: Leave blank if using AlgoVoi Cloud. Algorand wallet address for ALGO / USDC payouts (58-char base32) — only required for direct-API mode.

parameters.name: payout_voi
parameters.label: Payout Address — VOI (direct-API only)
parameters.help: Leave blank if using AlgoVoi Cloud. VOI wallet address for VOI / aUSDC payouts — direct-API mode only.

parameters.name: payout_hedera
parameters.label: Payout Address — Hedera (direct-API only)
parameters.help: Leave blank if using AlgoVoi Cloud. Hedera account ID (e.g. 0.0.123456) for HBAR / USDC payouts — direct-API mode only.

parameters.name: payout_stellar
parameters.label: Payout Address — Stellar (direct-API only)
parameters.help: Leave blank if using AlgoVoi Cloud. Stellar public key (starts with G) for XLM / USDC payouts — direct-API mode only.

parameters.name: webhook_secret
parameters.label: Webhook Secret
parameters.help: Optional HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for verifying webhook authenticity. Found in dash.algovoi.co.uk → Settings → Webhooks. Recommended for production.

actions.name: createPaymentLink
actions.label: Create Payment Link
actions.description: Creates a hosted AlgoVoi checkout URL. Share it with a customer — they pay with their crypto wallet, no account required.

parameters.name: label
parameters.label: Payment Label
parameters.help: Description shown to the customer (e.g. 'Premium access — 1 month').

actions.name: verifyPayment
actions.label: Verify Payment
actions.description: Checks whether an AlgoVoi checkout token has been paid on-chain.

parameters.name: token
parameters.label: Checkout Token
parameters.help: The checkout token from a previous Create Payment Link action or AlgoVoi webhook payload.

actions.name: listNetworks
actions.label: List Networks
actions.description: Returns all AlgoVoi-supported networks (Algorand, VOI, Hedera, Stellar — mainnet and testnet).

triggers.name: paymentConfirmed
triggers.label: Payment Confirmed
triggers.description: Triggers instantly when an AlgoVoi crypto payment is confirmed on-chain.
